title: Spanish 900: Food, Shopping & Money
focus: Practical real-world Spanish for ordering, groceries, payment, preferences, and polite complaints.

sentences.spanish: Quería una mesa para dos personas, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like a table for two people, please.

sentences.spanish: ¿Me puede traer la carta de vinos?
sentences.english: Can you bring me the wine list?

sentences.spanish: De primero, quiero la sopa de tomate.
sentences.english: For the first course, I want the tomato soup.

sentences.spanish: Y de segundo, el pollo asado con patatas.
sentences.english: And for the main course, the roast chicken with potatoes.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tienen algún plato vegetariano en el menú?
sentences.english: Do you have any vegetarian dishes on the menu?

sentences.spanish: Soy alérgico a los frutos secos, ¿esto lleva nueces?
sentences.english: I am allergic to nuts, does this have walnuts in it?

sentences.spanish: Para mí, agua sin gas, por favor.
sentences.english: For me, still water, please.

sentences.spanish: La carne está muy hecha, la prefiero al punto.
sentences.english: The meat is very well done, I prefer it medium.

sentences.spanish: ¿Nos puede traer un poco más de pan?
sentences.english: Can you bring us a little more bread?

sentences.spanish: La cuenta, por favor, cuando pueda.
sentences.english: The bill, please, whenever you can.

sentences.spanish: ¿Qué me recomienda de postre?
sentences.english: What do you recommend for dessert?

sentences.spanish: El pastel de chocolate está delicioso.
sentences.english: The chocolate cake is delicious.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero el pescado a la carne para cenar.
sentences.english: I prefer fish to meat for dinner.

sentences.spanish: No me gusta la comida muy picante.
sentences.english: I don't like very spicy food.

sentences.spanish: ¿A qué hora abren la cocina para la cena?
sentences.english: What time do you open the kitchen for dinner?

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría pedir la comida para llevar.
sentences.english: I would like to order the food to go.

sentences.spanish: Hoy invito yo, guarda tu cartera.
sentences.english: I'm paying today, put your wallet away.

sentences.spanish: Vamos a compartir una ración de calamares.
sentences.english: Let's share a portion of calamari.

sentences.spanish: El café está demasiado frío.
sentences.english: The coffee is too cold.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tienen leche de avena o de soja?
sentences.english: Do you have oat or soy milk?

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde están los productos lácteos?
sentences.english: Where are the dairy products?

sentences.spanish: Necesito medio kilo de manzanas rojas.
sentences.english: I need half a kilo of red apples.

sentences.spanish: Las naranjas están de oferta esta semana.
sentences.english: Oranges are on sale this week.

sentences.spanish: Póngame un cuarto de kilo de queso curado.
sentences.english: Give me a quarter kilo of aged cheese.

sentences.spanish: ¿Me lo puede cortar en lonchas finas?
sentences.english: Can you cut it into thin slices for me?

sentences.spanish: No encuentro la sal, ¿me ayuda?
sentences.english: I can't find the salt, can you help me?

sentences.spanish: Estas verduras no parecen muy frescas.
sentences.english: These vegetables don't look very fresh.

sentences.spanish: Quiero dos barras de pan y unos cruasanes.
sentences.english: I want two loaves of bread and some croissants.

sentences.spanish: ¿Venden bolsas de basura aquí?
sentences.english: Do you sell trash bags here?

sentences.spanish: Se me ha olvidado comprar huevos.
sentences.english: I forgot to buy eggs.

sentences.spanish: ¿Pesa la fruta usted o la peso yo?
sentences.english: Do you weigh the fruit or do I weigh it?

sentences.spanish: Me llevo también esta botella de aceite de oliva.
sentences.english: I'll also take this bottle of olive oil.

sentences.spanish: El pasillo de las bebidas está al fondo.
sentences.english: The drinks aisle is at the back.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tiene cambio de un billete de cincuenta?
sentences.english: Do you have change for a fifty bill?

sentences.spanish: Solo voy a comprar unas pocas cosas.
sentences.english: I'm only going to buy a few things.

sentences.spanish: La caja rápida es para menos de diez artículos.
sentences.english: The express lane is for fewer than ten items.

sentences.spanish: Necesito una bolsa de plástico, por favor.
sentences.english: I need a plastic bag, please.

sentences.spanish: He traído mis propias bolsas de tela.
sentences.english: I brought my own cloth bags.

sentences.spanish: ¿A qué hora cierra el supermercado los domingos?
sentences.english: What time does the supermarket close on Sundays?

sentences.spanish: El carrito de la compra está atascado.
sentences.english: The shopping cart is stuck.

sentences.spanish: Estoy buscando una camisa blanca para una boda.
sentences.english: I am looking for a white shirt for a wedding.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tienen este vestido en una talla más grande?
sentences.english: Do you have this dress in a larger size?

sentences.spanish: Mi talla de zapatos es el cuarenta y dos.
sentences.english: My shoe size is forty-two.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde están los probadores?
sentences.english: Where are the fitting rooms?

sentences.spanish: Esta chaqueta me queda un poco estrecha.
sentences.english: This jacket fits me a little tight.

sentences.spanish: Los pantalones me quedan largos, necesito arreglarlos.
sentences.english: The pants are too long, I need to get them tailored.

sentences.spanish: Solo estoy mirando, muchas gracias.
sentences.english: I'm just looking, thank you very much.

sentences.spanish: Me encanta el color, pero el diseño no me convence.
sentences.english: I love the color, but the design doesn't convince me.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tienen estos mismos zapatos en color negro?
sentences.english: Do you have these same shoes in black?

sentences.spanish: Creo que la talla mediana me quedará mejor.
sentences.english: I think the medium size will fit me better.

sentences.spanish: ¿Puedo devolver este pantalón si no me sirve?
sentences.english: Can I return these pants if they don't fit?

sentences.spanish: Tiene treinta días para hacer cualquier cambio o devolución.
sentences.english: You have thirty days to make any exchange or return.

sentences.spanish: Necesito el tique de compra para la devolución.
sentences.english: I need the receipt for the return.

sentences.spanish: Este jersey tiene un pequeño defecto en la manga.
sentences.english: This sweater has a small defect on the sleeve.

sentences.spanish: Me lo llevo, es justo lo que buscaba.
sentences.english: I'll take it, it's just what I was looking for.

sentences.spanish: ¿Hacen descuentos para estudiantes?
sentences.english: Do you offer student discounts?

sentences.spanish: Estas zapatillas están en rebajas.
sentences.english: These sneakers are on sale.

sentences.spanish: La tela de esta camiseta es muy suave.
sentences.english: The fabric of this t-shirt is very soft.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría comprar un regalo para mi madre.
sentences.english: I would like to buy a gift for my mother.

sentences.spanish: ¿Me lo puede envolver para regalo, por favor?
sentences.english: Can you gift-wrap it for me, please?

sentences.spanish: Estoy buscando la sección de electrónica.
sentences.english: I am looking for the electronics section.

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta este teléfono móvil?
sentences.english: How much does this mobile phone cost?

sentences.spanish: La batería de este ordenador no dura mucho.
sentences.english: The battery of this computer doesn't last long.

sentences.spanish: Quiero comprar un libro en español para practicar.
sentences.english: I want to buy a book in Spanish to practice.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tienen una funda para este modelo de tableta?
sentences.english: Do you have a case for this tablet model?

sentences.spanish: Me parece un poco caro, la verdad.
sentences.english: It seems a bit expensive, to be honest.

sentences.spanish: Es muy barato, es una ganga.
sentences.english: It's very cheap, it's a bargain.

sentences.spanish: ¿Puedo pagar con tarjeta de crédito?
sentences.english: Can I pay with a credit card?

sentences.spanish: El datáfono no funciona, tiene que pagar en efectivo.
sentences.english: The card machine isn't working, you have to pay in cash.

sentences.spanish: No tengo suelto, solo llevo billetes grandes.
sentences.english: I don't have exact change, I only have large bills.

sentences.spanish: Por favor, introduzca su código PIN.
sentences.english: Please enter your PIN code.

sentences.spanish: Puede acercar la tarjeta al lector.
sentences.english: You can tap your card on the reader.

sentences.spanish: ¿Quiere una copia del recibo?
sentences.english: Do you want a copy of the receipt?

sentences.spanish: Me han cobrado dos veces este artículo.
sentences.english: I have been charged twice for this item.

sentences.spanish: Creo que hay un error en la cuenta.
sentences.english: I think there is a mistake on the bill.

sentences.spanish: Aquí tiene su cambio y su tique.
sentences.english: Here is your change and your receipt.

sentences.spanish: Tengo que ir a un cajero automático a sacar dinero.
sentences.english: I have to go to an ATM to withdraw money.

sentences.spanish: ¿Me cobra, por favor?
sentences.english: Can you ring me up, please?

sentences.spanish: La máquina no acepta monedas de uno o dos céntimos.
sentences.english: The machine doesn't accept one or two cent coins.

sentences.spanish: He perdido mi tarjeta, tengo que bloquearla.
sentences.english: I've lost my card, I have to block it.

sentences.spanish: A mí me gusta más ir a los mercados locales.
sentences.english: I prefer going to local markets more.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero comprar fruta fresca todos los días.
sentences.english: I prefer to buy fresh fruit every day.

sentences.spanish: Normalmente, hago la compra los sábados por la mañana.
sentences.english: I usually do the grocery shopping on Saturday mornings.

sentences.spanish: No soporto hacer cola en el supermercado.
sentences.english: I can't stand waiting in line at the supermarket.

sentences.spanish: Me gustan más las tiendas pequeñas que los grandes centros comerciales.
sentences.english: I like small shops better than large shopping malls.

sentences.spanish: Esta marca es más cara, pero tiene mejor calidad.
sentences.english: This brand is more expensive, but it has better quality.

sentences.spanish: Ese restaurante italiano es mi favorito del barrio.
sentences.english: That Italian restaurant is my favorite in the neighborhood.

sentences.spanish: A mi hijo no le gustan nada las verduras.
sentences.english: My son doesn't like vegetables at all.

sentences.spanish: Creo que esta camiseta es más bonita que la azul.
sentences.english: I think this t-shirt is prettier than the blue one.

sentences.spanish: La música aquí está un poco alta, ¿verdad?
sentences.english: The music here is a bit loud, right?

sentences.spanish: Perdone, pero yo había pedido pollo, no pescado.
sentences.english: Excuse me, but I had ordered chicken, not fish.

sentences.spanish: El plato está sucio, ¿me lo puede cambiar?
sentences.english: The plate is dirty, can you change it for me?

sentences.spanish: Llevamos más de media hora esperando nuestra comida.
sentences.english: We have been waiting for our food for over half an hour.

sentences.spanish: Esta leche ha caducado, la fecha es de ayer.
sentences.english: This milk has expired, the date is from yesterday.

sentences.spanish: La cremallera de este abrigo está rota.
sentences.english: The zipper on this coat is broken.

sentences.spanish: He comprado esto esta mañana y no funciona.
sentences.english: I bought this this morning and it doesn't work.

sentences.spanish: Disculpe, creo que me ha dado mal el cambio.
sentences.english: Excuse me, I think you gave me the wrong change.

sentences.spanish: Quisiera hablar con el encargado, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like to speak to the manager, please.

sentences.spanish: El precio en la etiqueta es diferente al precio en la caja.
sentences.english: The price on the tag is different from the price at the register.

sentences.spanish: Siento las molestias, le devuelvo su dinero de inmediato.
sentences.english: I apologize for the inconvenience, I will refund your money immediately.
